dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree node_modules missing turbo binary on fresh worktree
dogfoodPatterns.description: On this EM cycle startup, turbo was not found in worktree node_modules (ERROR: Cannot find module '.../node_modules/turbo/bin/turbo'). Had to run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to fix. Worktrees do not automatically inherit the correct node_modules symlink structure from the parent repo. Affects any agent running pnpm build in a fresh worktree.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add pnpm install --frozen-lockfile as a pre-build step in EM startup scripts, or document worktree setup requirements. Consider adding worktree pnpm install to the worktree creation script.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: no-governance-self-modification blocks read-only SQLite analytics queries
dogfoodPatterns.resolvedBy: PR #1418 merged 2026-03-29. No-governance-self-modification now exempts read-only agentguard.db queries.
dogfoodPatterns.description: RESOLVED this cycle. analytics-invariant-researcher was blocked from querying agentguard.db. LOCKDOWN risk eliminated.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: docker stop/rm blocked for named ephemeral test containers
dogfoodPatterns.description: Destructive command guard blocks docker stop/rm on named test containers. No distinction between production and test containers. QA smoke runner workaround: npm run db:test:down (routes via Node.js). Two occurrences documented.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add policy allowlist for known test container name patterns or expose a test-scope context.
